seoTitle: How to Integrate Toast POS With QuickBooks Online
metaDescription: Connect your Toast POS system to QuickBooks Online to automatically sync daily restaurant sales, tips, and processing fees.
intro: Manually entering daily restaurant sales summaries from Toast into QuickBooks eats up hours and invites reconciliation errors. This guide covers linking the two platforms through the QuickBooks App Store, mapping sales categories, and running your first sync. It's for restaurant owners and hospitality bookkeepers who want their POS and accounting system to stay aligned.

steps.heading: Find the Toast app in QuickBooks
steps.body: From the left sidebar, click Apps, then Find Apps, and search for Toast to locate the official integration.

steps.heading: Authorize the connection
steps.body: Click Get App Now, then log in with your Toast credentials and complete any multi-factor authentication prompts.

steps.heading: Map your sales categories
steps.body: Review the mapping screen to pair Toast sales categories, gift card liabilities, and tip payouts with the right accounts in your Chart of Accounts.

steps.heading: Set up a credit card clearing account
steps.body: Create a dedicated clearing account so daily card, cash, and delivery app payments don't double-count against your live bank feed.

steps.heading: Run and verify the sync
steps.body: Click Sync Now to pull in your daily sales summary, then check your Chart of Accounts to confirm the entries posted correctly.

faq.question: Why does Toast need its own clearing account?
faq.answer: Without one, the daily sales summary synced from Toast can double up against payments already appearing in your live bank feed.

faq.question: Does the integration handle tips automatically?
faq.answer: Yes, as long as your tip payout categories are mapped correctly during setup, the sync will route them to the right liability account.

faq.question: Can I sync historical sales data from before I connected the app?
faq.answer: The initial sync can pull in pending historical records, though how far back it reaches depends on your Toast account settings.

faq.question: What if my sync shows a mismatch?
faq.answer: Use the Toast sync status dashboard inside QuickBooks to locate and troubleshoot specific data discrepancies.
